# Pregnancy Biological Summary

## Setup & Data

```{r}
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(HDAnalyzeR)
library(patchwork)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(stringr)
library(GOSemSim)

select <- dplyr::select
rename <- dplyr::rename
```

```{r}
# Olink -----
olink <- read_tsv("data/data_phase2_HT_bridged_curated_subset_20251031.tsv") |>
    select("DAid", "Assay", "UniProt", "Batch", "NPX", "LOD")

# Soma -----
soma_wide <- read_tsv("data/data_phase2_somalogic_curated_subset_20251031.tsv")
soma_meta <- read_tsv("data/meta_phase2_somalogic_elod_20251028.tsv")

soma <- soma_wide |>
  pivot_longer(cols = -c("DAid"), names_to = "AptName", values_to = "Value") |>
  left_join(soma_meta |> filter(Organism == "Human") |> select(AptName, EntrezGeneSymbol), by = "AptName") |>
  rename(Assay = EntrezGeneSymbol) |> 
  filter(!is.na(Assay))

# Sample metadata ----
sample_meta <- read_excel("data/samples_2025-10-10.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    Disease = ifelse(Cohort == "PARD", Diagnose, Disease),
    Disease = ifelse(Disease %in% c("Healthy control", "healthy", "Control"), "Healthy", Disease),
    Disease = case_when(Disease == "Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma" ~ "Pancreatic cancer",
                        Diagnose == "OVC" ~  "Ovarian cancer",
                        Diagnose == "BRC" ~ "Breast cancer",
                        Diagnose == "LUNG" ~ "Lung cancer",
                        Diagnose == "CRC" ~ "Colorectal cancer",
                        Diagnose == "PRC" ~ "Prostate cancer",
                        Diagnose == "4_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 4",
                        Diagnose == "8_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 8",
                        Diagnose == "16_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 16",
                        Diagnose == "24_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 24",
                        Diagnose == "pregnancy" ~ "Pregnancy",
                        Diagnose == "PD" ~ "Parkinson's disease",
                        T ~ Disease),
    Class = case_when(Disease %in% c("Breast cancer", "Colorectal cancer", "Lung cancer", "Ovarian cancer", "Prostate cancer") ~ "Cancer",
                      Disease == "Parkinson's disease" ~ "Neurologic",
                      Cohort == "BAMS" ~ "Healthy",
                      Cohort == "PREG" ~ "Healthy",
                      Disease == "Healthy" ~ "Healthy",
                      T ~ Class)
    ) |>
  select(DAid, Cohort, Class, Disease, Age, Sex, BMI)

de_olink <- read_tsv("data/preg_olink_mm.tsv")
de_soma <- read_tsv("data/preg_soma_mm.tsv") |> 
  left_join(soma_meta |> filter(Organism == "Human") |> select(Assay = EntrezGeneSymbol, Protein = AptName), by = "Protein") |> 
  group_by(contrast, Assay) |>
  arrange(desc(t.ratio), .by_group = TRUE) |>
  slice_head(n = 1) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-Protein) |>
  rename(Protein = Assay)
```

```{r}
de_olink_t2_t1 <- de_olink |> filter(contrast == "T2 - T1")
de_olink_t2_t1 <- list(
  de_res = de_olink_t2_t1 |> rename(Feature = Protein, t = t.ratio)
)
class(de_olink_t2_t1) <- "hd_de"
de_olink_t2_t1$de_res <- as_tibble(de_olink_t2_t1$de_res)
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(de_olink_t2_t1, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "t")
enrichment_kegg <- hd_gsea(de_olink_t2_t1, database = "KEGG", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "t")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(de_olink_t2_t1, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "t")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
kegg_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_kegg$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_olink_t2_t1 <- bind_rows(go_tbl, kegg_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

top_terms_olink_t2_t1 <- combined_olink_t2_t1 |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
de_olink_t3_t2 <- de_olink |> filter(contrast == "T3 - T2")
de_olink_t3_t2 <- list(
  de_res = de_olink_t3_t2 |> rename(Feature = Protein, t = t.ratio)
)
class(de_olink_t3_t2) <- "hd_de"
de_olink_t3_t2$de_res <- as_tibble(de_olink_t3_t2$de_res)
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(de_olink_t3_t2, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "t")
enrichment_kegg <- hd_gsea(de_olink_t3_t2, database = "KEGG", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "t")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(de_olink_t3_t2, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "t")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
kegg_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_kegg$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_olink_t3_t2 <- bind_rows(go_tbl, kegg_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

top_terms_olink_t3_t2 <- combined_olink_t3_t2 |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
de_soma_t2_t1 <- de_soma |> filter(contrast == "T2 - T1")
de_soma_t2_t1 <- list(
  de_res = de_soma_t2_t1 |> rename(Feature = Protein, t = t.ratio)
)
class(de_soma_t2_t1) <- "hd_de"
de_soma_t2_t1$de_res <- as_tibble(de_soma_t2_t1$de_res)
# No significant GO terms, so only KEGG and Reactome
enrichment_kegg <- hd_gsea(de_soma_t2_t1, database = "KEGG", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "t")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(de_soma_t2_t1, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "t")

kegg_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_kegg$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_soma_t2_t1 <- bind_rows(kegg_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

top_terms_soma_t2_t1 <- combined_soma_t2_t1 |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
de_soma_t3_t2 <- de_soma |> filter(contrast == "T3 - T2")
de_soma_t3_t2 <- list(
  de_res = de_soma_t3_t2 |> rename(Feature = Protein, t = t.ratio)
)
class(de_soma_t3_t2) <- "hd_de"
de_soma_t3_t2$de_res <- as_tibble(de_soma_t3_t2$de_res)
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(de_soma_t3_t2, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "t")
enrichment_kegg <- hd_gsea(de_soma_t3_t2, database = "KEGG", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "t")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(de_soma_t3_t2, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "t")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
kegg_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_kegg$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_soma_t3_t2 <- bind_rows(go_tbl, kegg_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

top_terms_soma_t3_t2 <- combined_soma_t3_t2 |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
top_terms_t2_t1 <- bind_rows(
  top_terms_olink_t2_t1 |> mutate(Platform = "Olink"),
  top_terms_soma_t2_t1 |> mutate(Platform = "SomaScan")
)

top_terms_t3_t2 <- bind_rows(
  top_terms_olink_t3_t2 |> mutate(Platform = "Olink"),
  top_terms_soma_t3_t2 |> mutate(Platform = "SomaScan")
)

write_csv(top_terms_t2_t1, "data/pregnancy_terms_T1T2.csv")
write_csv(top_terms_t3_t2, "data/pregnancy_terms_T2T3.csv")
```

```{r}
terms_T1T2 <- read.csv("data/pregnancy_terms_T1T2.csv")
terms_T2T3 <- read.csv("data/pregnancy_terms_T2T3.csv")

top_terms <- bind_rows(terms_T1T2, terms_T2T3) |> 
  distinct(Description, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Filter top 50 proteins from both Olink and Soma by min p.value, 
# breaking ties with the highest absolute t.ratio
top50_olink <- de_olink |>
  arrange(p.value, desc(abs(t.ratio))) |>
  head(200)

top50_soma <- de_soma |>
  arrange(p.value, desc(abs(t.ratio))) |>
  head(200)

top_proteins <- unique(c(top50_olink$Protein, top50_soma$Protein))

pathway_genes <- top_terms |>
  select(Description, core_enrichment) |>
  separate_rows(core_enrichment, sep = "/") |>
  rename(Entrez = core_enrichment)

# Convert Entrez IDs to Gene Symbols
gene_symbols <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db, 
                       keys = pathway_genes$Entrez, 
                       column = "SYMBOL", 
                       keytype = "ENTREZID", 
                       multiVals = "first")

pathway_genes$Symbol <- gene_symbols

pathway_genes <- pathway_genes |>
  filter(Symbol %in% top_proteins)

enrichment_edges <- pathway_genes |>
  mutate(value = 1) |>
  distinct(Description, Symbol, value)
mat_wide <- enrichment_edges |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Symbol, values_from = value, values_fill = 0) |>
  as.data.frame()
rownames(mat_wide) <- mat_wide$Description
enrichment_matrix <- as.matrix(mat_wide[, -1])

# Clustering
row_clust <- hclust(dist(enrichment_matrix), method = "complete")
col_clust <- hclust(dist(t(enrichment_matrix)), method = "complete")
row_levels <- rownames(enrichment_matrix)[row_clust$order]
col_levels <- colnames(enrichment_matrix)[col_clust$order]

plot_data <- expand.grid(
  Description = row_levels,
  Symbol = col_levels,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

plot_data <- plot_data |>
  mutate(Description = str_wrap(Description, width = 50)) |>
  left_join(enrichment_edges, by = c("Description", "Symbol")) |>
  mutate(value = ifelse(is.na(value), 0, value)) |>
  mutate(
    Description = factor(Description, levels = str_wrap(row_levels, width = 50)),
    Symbol = factor(Symbol, levels = col_levels)
  )

# Base Heatmap
p_heatmap <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Symbol, y = Description, fill = factor(value))) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", size = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "#f0f0f0", "1" = "#B2182B"), 
                    labels = c("0" = "Absent", "1" = "Enriched"),
                    name = "Protein Status") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6, angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6, lineheight = 0.7, vjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

# Row annotation early vs late pregnancy
n_terms <- length(row_levels)
annot_data <- data.frame(Description = row_levels, y_idx = 1:n_terms) |>
  mutate(
    in_T1T2 = Description %in% top20_T1T2$Description,
    in_T2T3 = Description %in% top20_T2T3$Description
  )

bar_dots <- annot_data |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(x_vals = list(
    unique(c(
      if(in_T1T2) c(1, 2) else numeric(0),
      if(in_T2T3) c(2, 3) else numeric(0)
    ))
  )) |>
  unnest(x_vals) |>
  rename(x = x_vals) |>
  mutate(
    fill = case_when(
      x == 1 ~ "#CDDBCD",
      x == 2 ~ "#DFC688", 
      x == 3 ~ "#C88A6B"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup()

p_side <- ggplot(bar_dots, aes(x = x, y = y_idx)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = y_idx), color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.8, lineend = "round") +
  geom_point(aes(fill = fill), shape = 21, color = "white", size = 3, stroke = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0.5, 3.5), 
    position = "top"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(1, n_terms), expand = expansion(add = 0.6)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 2),
  )

# Protein Olink vs SomaScan annotation
de_olink <- de_olink |> mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p.value, method = "fdr"))
de_soma  <- de_soma  |> mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p.value, method = "fdr"))

sig_olink <- de_olink |> filter(FDR < 0.05) |> pull(Protein) |> unique()
sig_soma  <- de_soma  |> filter(FDR < 0.05) |> pull(Protein) |> unique()

col_annot <- data.frame(Symbol = factor(col_levels, levels = col_levels)) |>
  mutate(
    in_olink = Symbol %in% sig_olink,
    in_soma  = Symbol %in% sig_soma,
    Platform = case_when(
      in_olink & in_soma ~ "Both",
      in_olink           ~ "Olink",
      in_soma            ~ "Soma",
      TRUE               ~ "Not Sig"
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(Platform = factor(Platform, levels = c("Olink", "Soma", "Both", "Not Sig")))

p_top <- ggplot(col_annot, aes(x = Symbol, y = 1, fill = Platform)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Olink" = "#6FC2EE", "Soma" = "#D82F88", "Both" = "#312F7C"),
    drop = FALSE,
    name = "Significant In:"
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 2, 2, 5)
  )

layout_design <- "
A#
BC
"

final_plot_with_top <- p_top + p_heatmap + p_side +
  plot_layout(
    design = layout_design,
    widths = c(10, 0.5),
    heights = c(0.2, 10)
  )

ggsave("results/pregnancy_gsea_detailed_heatmap.pdf", width = 15, height = 10)
final_plot_with_top
```

```{r}
terms_T1T2 <- read.csv("data/pregnancy_terms_T1T2.csv") |> mutate(Comparison = "T1 to T2")
terms_T2T3 <- read.csv("data/pregnancy_terms_T2T3.csv") |> mutate(Comparison = "T2 to T3")

terms_T1T2 <- terms_T1T2 |> mutate(Platform = ifelse(Platform == "Soma", "SomaScan", Platform))
terms_T2T3 <- terms_T2T3 |> mutate(Platform = ifelse(Platform == "Soma", "SomaScan", Platform))

top_terms <- bind_rows(terms_T1T2, terms_T2T3)

# Separate GO terms from non-GO terms
go_terms <- top_terms |> filter(grepl("^GO:", ID))
non_go_terms <- top_terms |> filter(!grepl("^GO:", ID))

term_to_rep <- list()

for (ont in unique(go_terms$ONTOLOGY)) {
  if (is.na(ont)) next
  
  ont_terms <- go_terms |> filter(ONTOLOGY == ont)
  
  if (nrow(ont_terms) <= 1) {
    for (i in 1:nrow(ont_terms)) {
      term_to_rep[[ont_terms$Description[i]]] <- ont_terms$Description[i]
    }
    next
  }
  
  # Calculate semantic similarity
  hsGO <- godata('org.Hs.eg.db', ont = ont)
  sim_mat <- termSim(ont_terms$ID, ont_terms$ID, semData = hsGO, method = "Wang")
  
  dist_mat <- as.dist(1 - sim_mat)
  hc <- hclust(dist_mat, method = "average")
  
  # Group terms with distance < 0.4
  clusters <- cutree(hc, h = 0.4) 
  
  ont_terms$cluster <- clusters

  rep_mapping <- ont_terms |> 
    group_by(cluster) |> 
    mutate(Rep_Description = Description[which.min(p.adjust)]) |>
    ungroup()
  
  for (i in 1:nrow(rep_mapping)) {
    term_to_rep[[rep_mapping$Description[i]]] <- rep_mapping$Rep_Description[i]
  }
}

# Group GO terms by their semantic representative
go_grouped <- go_terms |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(Description = term_to_rep[[Description]]) |>
  ungroup()

all_grouped_terms <- bind_rows(go_grouped, non_go_terms)

# Define a dictionary of pathways you want to manually group together
manual_groups <- c(
  # Sphingolipids
  "Glycosphingolipid catabolism" = "Sphingolipid & Glycosphingolipid metabolism",
  "Glycosphingolipid metabolism" = "Sphingolipid & Glycosphingolipid metabolism",
  "Sphingolipid metabolism"      = "Sphingolipid & Glycosphingolipid metabolism",
  
  # ECM & Adhesion
  "Extracellular matrix organization"        = "ECM organization & Integrin interactions",
  "extracellular matrix organization"        = "ECM organization & Integrin interactions",
  "collagen-containing extracellular matrix" = "ECM organization & Integrin interactions",
  "ECM proteoglycans"                        = "ECM organization & Integrin interactions",
  "ECM-receptor interaction"                 = "ECM organization & Integrin interactions",
  "Non-integrin membrane-ECM interactions"   = "ECM organization & Integrin interactions",
  "Cell adhesion molecule (CAM) interaction" = "ECM organization & Integrin interactions",
  "Focal adhesion"                           = "ECM organization & Integrin interactions",
  "Integrin cell surface interactions"       = "ECM organization & Integrin interactions",
  "Integrin signaling"                       = "ECM organization & Integrin interactions",
  
  # Elastic Fibers
  "Elastic fibre formation"                  = "Elastic fibre formation & associated molecules",
  "Molecules associated with elastic fibres" = "Elastic fibre formation & associated molecules",
  
  # Complement System
  "Complement cascade"               = "Complement cascade & triggering",
  "Initial triggering of complement" = "Complement cascade & triggering",
  
  # Glycans and GAGs
  "Glycosaminoglycan degradation"          = "Glycan & GAG metabolism/degradation",
  "HS-GAG degradation"                     = "Glycan & GAG metabolism/degradation",
  "Other glycan degradation"               = "Glycan & GAG metabolism/degradation",
  "Various types of N-glycan biosynthesis" = "Glycan & GAG metabolism/degradation",
  
  # Splicing
  "Spliceosome"                   = "mRNA Splicing & Spliceosome",
  "mRNA Splicing - Major Pathway" = "mRNA Splicing & Spliceosome",
  
  # Peptide Hormones
  "Peptide hormone biosynthesis" = "Peptide hormone biosynthesis & response",
  "response to peptide hormone"  = "Peptide hormone biosynthesis & response",
  
  # Post-translational modifications
  "Post-translational protein modification"    = "Post-translational protein modification/phosphorylation",
  "Post-translational protein phosphorylation" = "Post-translational protein modification/phosphorylation",
  
  # Receptors and Cytokines
  "Cytokine-cytokine receptor interaction"    = "Cytokine & Receptor ligand interactions",
  "Neuroactive ligand-receptor interaction"   = "Cytokine & Receptor ligand interactions",
  "receptor ligand activity"                  = "Cytokine & Receptor ligand interactions",
  "transmembrane signaling receptor activity" = "Cytokine & Receptor ligand interactions"
)

all_grouped_terms <- all_grouped_terms |>
  mutate(Description = if_else(Description %in% names(manual_groups), 
                               unname(manual_groups[Description]), 
                               Description))

merged_data <- all_grouped_terms |>
  group_by(Description, Comparison, Platform) |>
  summarise(
    NES = mean(NES),
    p.adjust = min(p.adjust),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pal_time <- c("T1" = "#CDDBCD", "T2" = "#DFC688", "T3" = "#C88A6B")
pal_platform <- c("Olink" = "#6FC2EE", "SomaScan" = "#D82F88")

terms_t2 <- merged_data |> filter(Comparison == "T1 to T2") |> pull(Description) |> unique()
terms_t3 <- merged_data |> filter(Comparison == "T2 to T3") |> pull(Description) |> unique()

merged_data <- merged_data |>
  group_by(Description) |>
  mutate(
    Status = case_when(
      Description %in% terms_t2 & Description %in% terms_t3 ~ "Shared",
      Description %in% terms_t2 ~ "T1 to T2",
      Description %in% terms_t3 ~ "T2 to T3"
    ),
    avg_nes = mean(NES)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(Description = reorder(Description, avg_nes))

bar_dots <- merged_data |>
  distinct(Description, Status) |>
  mutate(y_idx = as.numeric(Description)) |>
  reframe(
    Description = Description,
    y_idx = y_idx,
    x = case_when(
      Status == "T1 to T2" ~ list(c(1, 2)),
      Status == "T2 to T3" ~ list(c(2, 3)),
      Status == "Shared" ~ list(c(1, 2, 3))
    ),
    fill = case_when(
      Status == "T1 to T2" ~ list(c(pal_time["T1"], pal_time["T2"])),
      Status == "T2 to T3" ~ list(c(pal_time["T2"], pal_time["T3"])),
      Status == "Shared" ~ list(c(pal_time["T1"], pal_time["T2"], pal_time["T3"]))
    )
  ) |>
  unnest(cols = c(x, fill))

n_terms <- length(unique(merged_data$Description))

p_main <- ggplot(merged_data, aes(x = Description, y = NES, color = Platform)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey90") +
  # To avoid dots perfectly overlapping if NES is exactly identical, we add a slight horizontal dodge
  geom_point(aes(size = -log10(p.adjust), shape = Comparison), alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_platform, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("T1 to T2" = 17, "T2 to T3" = 16)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(65), expand = expansion(add = 0.6)) + 
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Normalized Enrichment Score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 5, lineheight = 0.8), # Kept text small since there will be many terms
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 0, 5, 5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

p_side <- ggplot(bar_dots, aes(x = x, y = y_idx)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = y_idx), color = "grey92", linewidth = 1.2, lineend = "round") +
  geom_point(aes(fill = fill), shape = 21, color = "white", size = 3, stroke = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 3.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(1, n_terms), expand = expansion(add = 0.6)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 2)
  )

enrichment_dots_final <- (p_main + p_side) + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.12))

enrichment_dots_final

ggsave("results/pregnancy_functional_enrichment_updated.pdf", enrichment_dots_final, width = 15, height = 20, units = "cm", limitsize = FALSE)
```

```{r}
pal_time <- c("T1" = "#CDDBCD", "T2" = "#DFC688", "T3" = "#C88A6B")
pal_platform <- c("Olink" = "#6FC2EE", "SomaScan" = "#D82F88")

terms_t2 <- unique(top_terms_t2_t1$Description)
terms_t3 <- unique(top_terms_t3_t2$Description)

merged_data <- bind_rows(
  top_terms_t2_t1 |> mutate(Comparison = "T1 to T2"),
  top_terms_t3_t2 |> mutate(Comparison = "T2 to T3")
) |>
  group_by(Description) |>
  mutate(
    Status = case_when(
      Description %in% terms_t2 & Description %in% terms_t3 ~ "Shared",
      Description %in% terms_t2 ~ "T1 to T2",
      Description %in% terms_t3 ~ "T2 to T3"
    ),
    avg_nes = mean(NES)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(Description = reorder(Description, avg_nes))

bar_dots <- merged_data |>
  distinct(Description, Status) |>
  mutate(y_idx = as.numeric(Description)) |>
  group_by(Description) |>
  reframe(
    x = case_when(
      Status == "T1 to T2" ~ list(c(1, 2)),
      Status == "T2 to T3" ~ list(c(2, 3)),
      Status == "Shared" ~ list(c(1, 2, 3))
    ),
    fill = case_when(
      Status == "T1 to T2" ~ list(c(pal_time["T1"], pal_time["T2"])),
      Status == "T2 to T3" ~ list(c(pal_time["T2"], pal_time["T3"])),
      Status == "Shared" ~ list(c(pal_time["T1"], pal_time["T2"], pal_time["T3"]))
    ),
    y_idx = y_idx
  ) |>
  unnest(cols = c(x, fill))

n_terms <- length(unique(merged_data$Description))

p_main <- ggplot(merged_data, aes(x = Description, y = NES, color = Platform)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey90") +
  geom_point(aes(size = -log10(p.adjust), shape = Comparison), alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_platform) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("T1 to T2" = 17, "T2 to T3" = 16)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(65), expand = expansion(add = 0.6)) + 
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Normalized Enrichment Score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6, lineheight = 0.8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 0, 5, 5)
  )

p_side <- ggplot(bar_dots, aes(x = x, y = y_idx)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = y_idx), color = "grey92", linewidth = 1.2, lineend = "round") +
  geom_point(aes(fill = fill), shape = 21, color = "white", size = 3, stroke = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 3.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(1, n_terms), expand = expansion(add = 0.6)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 2)
  )

enrichment_dots_final <- (p_main + p_side) + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.12)) +
  plot_annotation(
  )

enrichment_dots_final

ggsave("results/pregnancy_functional_enrichment.png", enrichment_dots_final, width = 21, height = 29.7, units = "cm")
```
